mapper.select: SELECT m.NO, TO_CHAR(m.WST_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS WST_DATE , m.WST_NUM, m.WST_NUM_SEQ, m.WST_SBN, e.NAME AS WST_SBN_NAME , m.WST_NM, m.REC_YN, m.REC_YN_NM , TO_CHAR(m.REC_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REC_DATE, m.REG_SBN , TO_CHAR(m.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REG_DATE, m.MAX_CNT , CEIL(m.MAX_CNT / #{pagePerRow} ) AS TOTAL_PAGE FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WST_DATE DESC) AS NO , WST_DATE, WST_NUM, WST_NUM_SEQ, WST_SBN, WST_NM , REC_YN , CASE WHEN REC_YN = 'Y' THEN '승인' ELSE '미승인' END AS REC_YN_NM , REC_DATE, REG_SBN, REG_DATE , COUNT(*) OVER() AS MAX_CNT FROM MDSETT1 WHERE 1 = 1 ) m LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE e ON e.EMPNO = m.WST_SBN OFFSET (#{pageNum} - 1) * #{pagePerRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pagePerRow} ROWS ONLY
